ON MATCH SET r_idat_uses2.evidence = CASE WHEN (r_idat_uses2.evidence IS NULL OR r_idat_uses2.evidence = '') THEN 'IDAT Loader used to deploy SystemBC malware.' ELSE r_idat_uses2.evidence END
MERGE (mal_meduza:Malware {name:'Meduza Stealer'})
ON CREATE SET mal_meduza.summary = 'Information-stealing malware; updated version 2.2 released on the dark web with expanded browser-based cryptocurrency wallet support and improved credit card grabber.'
ON MATCH SET mal_meduza.summary = CASE WHEN (mal_meduza.summary IS NULL OR mal_meduza.summary = '') THEN 'Information-stealing malware; updated version 2.2 released on the dark web with expanded browser-based cryptocurrency wallet support and improved credit card grabber.' ELSE mal_meduza.summary END
SET mal_meduza.family = CASE WHEN (mal_meduza.family IS NULL OR mal_meduza.family = '') THEN 'Stealer' ELSE mal_meduza.family END
MERGE (inc_meduza_update:Incident {id:'meduza-stealer-v2.2-release'})
ON CREATE SET inc_meduza_update.type = 'malware_release'
ON CREATE SET inc_meduza_update.summary = 'Threat actors behind Meduza Stealer released an updated version (2.2) on the dark web with expanded support for browser-based cryptocurrency wallets and improved credit card grabber.'
ON MATCH SET inc_meduza_update.type = CASE WHEN (inc_meduza_update.type IS NULL OR inc_meduza_update.type = '') THEN 'malware_release' ELSE inc_meduza_update.type END
ON MATCH SET inc_meduza_update.summary = CASE WHEN (inc_meduza_update.summary IS NULL OR inc_meduza_update.summary = '') THEN 'Threat actors behind Meduza Stealer released an updated version (2.2) on the dark web with expanded support for browser-based cryptocurrency wallets and improved credit card grabber.' ELSE inc_meduza_update.summary END
MERGE (inc_meduza_update)-[r_inc_mal4:involved_malware]->(mal_meduza)
ON CREATE SET r_inc_mal4.evidence = 'Updated version of Meduza Stealer (version 2.2) released on the dark web.'
ON MATCH SET r_inc_mal4.evidence = CASE WHEN (r_inc_mal4.evidence IS NULL OR r_inc_mal4.evidence = '') THEN 'Updated version of Meduza Stealer (version 2.2) released on the dark web.' ELSE r_inc_mal4.evidence END
